scope.mutation_posture: No canonical checkout, producer, runtime mirror, trust record, release, or hosting setting was changed.
scope.authority_posture: This evidence does not switch routing authority. aoa-routing remains canonical until a later explicit owner-succession landing.

search_modes: all organization repositories listed through the live GitHub repository surface
exact checkout, environment, URL, generated-artifact, and mirror path patterns
host systemd, user configuration, .aoa active config/scripts, Podman mounts, and abyss-machine trust state
organization_scan.github_code_search_note: The GitHub code-search endpoint reached its search-specific rate limit. Coverage did not depend on it: every active organization repository was present locally, fetched where needed, and searched at origin/main.

agent_process_baseline.smallest_observed_route_call: one exact task-family request after manual intent classification
agent_process_baseline.smallest_observed_result: advisory role/tier/artifact references, not an executable or runtime-neutral RunPlan
agent_process_baseline.artifact_maintenance_context_lower_bound: 15 to 16 repository roots in current routing CI
agent_process_baseline.comparison_rule: E1 must replay identical tasks and count tool calls, repository roots, manual transformations, elapsed time, and evidence completeness; unsupported old stages remain explicit rather than scored as zero cost

risk_register.risk: route-api reports ready while serving a 123-entry artifact without artifact_identity that matches a March 2026 source blob
risk_register.control: make mirror manifest, source ref, content digest, ABI identity, and trust admission part of health/readiness

risk_register.risk: the federation sync check cannot currently refresh aoa-routing because required docs and schemas still use former flat paths
risk_register.control: repair abyss-stack source mapping before trusting any shadow or owner-switch runtime proof

risk_register.risk: the exact origin/main routing bundle is denied by the stronger artifact gate due to source_ref_mismatch
risk_register.control: admit an exact commit-bound artifact before canonical switch; never reuse the old release-ready record as proof for a new source ref

risk_register.risk: the current checked-in origin artifact does not carry an exact sibling input revision matrix
risk_register.control: shadow producer receipts must include all 14 owner input refs and content digests

risk_register.risk: latest aoa-skills capability catalog and graph already break the routing compatibility canary
risk_register.control: fix producer drift before parity; pin an explicit old-input fixture and a latest-input compatibility lane

risk_register.risk: SDK latest-sibling canary fails on aoa-agents v2 and missing KAG/route expectations
risk_register.control: separate intentional version support from stale path assumptions and make compatibility errors typed

risk_register.risk: SDK release-cadence audit uses depth-one checkouts and therefore reports tags/releases missing on every sampled run
risk_register.control: fetch the evidence needed by the audit or query the hosting owner; do not retain a permanently false-red gate

risk_register.risk: default sibling-root discovery can select stale or dirty canonical checkouts and silently change generated output
risk_register.control: require explicit pinned roots for release and parity evidence

risk_register.risk: changing owner metadata inside artifact_identity can break byte parity even while the routing ABI is intended to stay stable
risk_register.control: separate succession metadata from ABI payload or version it in a dedicated, reviewed compatibility decision

risk_register.risk: copying 358 mechanics files, 396 KAG shard files, or 212 installed skill files would move repository cost into the SDK instead of reducing it
risk_register.control: absorb only the producer slice, regenerate indexes, and retire duplicate scaffolding

risk_register.risk: governed runner policies and tests are specialized around aoa-routing paths and target detectors
risk_register.control: keep owner switch separate from Runner work and add an explicit runtime adapter/target policy

risk_register.risk: old schema IDs and mirror paths embed aoa-routing
risk_register.control: preserve them as compatibility identifiers until consumer-zero; do not equate identifier namespace with current source owner

risk_register.risk: several canonical workspaces are intentionally dirty or on active user branches
risk_register.control: use origin/main worktrees and never normalize or overwrite those checkouts

risk_register.risk: the goal's literal canonical-producers 2-to-1 metric does not match live state: there is one canonical producer today
risk_register.control: measure canonical owners as 1-to-1, runnable implementations as 1-to-2-shadow-to-1, and active repository control planes as 2-to-1

known_evidence_gaps_not_classed_as_unkno: The exact 14 sibling commits used to create origin/main generated outputs are not embedded in the artifact.
Old-process token cost has no native telemetry; E1 must use a controlled proxy based on calls, loaded roots, bytes, and manual transformations.
The current runtime mirror has no manifest, so its source provenance was reconstructed by matching the Git blob to aoa-routing history.
required_compatibility_fixtures: all 14 outputs rebuilt from an explicit pinned input matrix
aoa_routing_thin_router_v1 artifact_identity and legacy schema IDs
aoa_router entry count and deterministic sort
negative stale, missing, malformed, and forbidden-owner fixtures
aoa-agents task-to-tier, task-to-surface, and tiny-entrypoint fixture
aoa-stats recommended-path and owner-shortlist downstream fixture
abyss-stack mirror manifest with source commit and per-file SHA-256
route-api router, task-family, surface-kind, return, starter, federation, recommended, pairing, and tiny-entry response fixtures
package-install fixture with no aoa-routing checkout
rollback fixture that reselects the predecessor producer during the compatibility window
consumer-zero scanner over all active organization repositories and host runtime config

gate_g0.next_stage: R1 target operating model and paired durable decisions
gate_g0.stop_line: No producer code moves and no authority switch until G1 and G2 pass.
